data.four_set_effect: Upon triggering an Elemental Reaction, increases all party members' Elemental Mastery by 120 for 8s.

circlet_of_logos.desc: A standard-issue honorary instructor's cap, only granted to those who turn down a promotion.
circlet_of_logos.title: Instructor's Cap

flower_of_life.desc: Whenever the instructor wore this brooch, it meant there would be no training sessions that day.
flower_of_life.title: Instructor's Brooch

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: It may seem like an ordinary tea cup to most. But to students, it is the symbol of the instructor's authority.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Instructor's Tea Cup

plume_of_death.desc: Any instructor who has mastered the art of de-escalation knows to keep this accessory firmly in their grasp at all times.
plume_of_death.title: Instructor's Feather Accessory

sands_of_eon.desc: A stopwatch used not for general timekeeping but to measure the duration of a training session.
sands_of_eon.title: Instructor's Pocket Watch

list.desc: Every student in the school knew that the strict instructor was a serious soldier.</br>But every week, there would always be a day or two when the instructor would wear this yellow flower brooch on his chest.</br>The smile on the instructor's face would always bring the students a sense of relief.</br>For when the instructor wore the yellow flower brooch, it meant that they could take a day off and go home.</br>Once his boisterous students had finally gone, the instructor would visit a silent graveyard.</br>There, after a moment of silence, he would pay his respects to the familiar names carved on the tombstones.</br>
list.title: Instructor's Brooch

list.desc: "I don't have the talent to command an army as its general,</br>Nor am I qualified for anything beyond being a soldier.</br>All I can do is to be a strict instructor to these children,</br>So that they might survive on the battlefield a bit longer."</br>
list.title: Instructor's Cap

list.desc: Every military school student knows that the so-called "free training time" could not have anything less to do with freedom.</br>The instructor sits back and watches while the students train rigorously in the field.</br>A cup of black tea with a little too much sugar in it marks a typical afternoon for the instructor.</br>This peaceful time is a privilege of the instructor, and the embodiment of his authority.</br>
list.title: Instructor's Tea Cup

list.desc: The strict instructor once sharpened his own combat skills on the merciless battlefield.</br>What he teaches the students goes beyond self-defense techniques to apply in battle.</br>Moreso than attacking and defending, what he imparts to them is the skill of surviving on the front line even in the face of insurmountable odds.</br>Every move and technique he demonstrates pays homage to the veterans of wars gone by.</br>For it was their sacrifices that helped him become who he is today.</br>
list.title: Instructor's Feather Accessory

list.desc: A pocket watch treasured by the instructor. It is not, however, military-issue gear from the instructor's school.</br>Back when the instructor was still a soldier, this pocket watch was used to coordinate charges against the enemy.</br>It marked victories and defeats, and counted the final hours of the soldiers.</br>For the students, it represented the hardships they endured on the long path towards becoming a real soldier.</br>
list.title: Instructor's Pocket Watch
